reviews.title: Nice speaker overall
reviews.text: My only complaints with this speaker might be user error, but I have an issue with the battery when it gets low.  The power button lights up, and the speaker basically won't turn or charge until you just let the rest of the battery run out, which can take several hours.  Connecting different phones via Bluetooth can also be a pain.

reviews.author: IamTheNumber4

reviews.title: Mini life jacket review
reviews.text: For the price this does have pretty good sound quality. It is durable and easy to use. My husband uses this on job sites, and we also take it on the boat and to the beach. It has held up well and has a good battery live.  The only issue is the bluetooth, you have to be pretty close to it for it to work.
reviews.author: tiff07

reviews.title: Good for the size
reviews.text: It worked fine for a few weeks until one day the power button got stuck and stopped working. I was able to reach out to Altec Lansing support and they were able to send me a brand new replacement as long as I returned my damaged one to them. The process did take almost a month but they were able to provide me a replacement. This speaker is decent for the size and price. It has a lot of bass but the sound isn’t as crispy and clear like the JBL one. Again for the price, it’s decent and the rubber jacket protects it with falls and bumps. I brought it to the beach multiple times and it survived.
reviews.author: Alex

reviews.title: Love this speaker!
reviews.text: Love this speaker! Loud, water resistant. Great for beach and outdoors. Hold charge for a long time
reviews.author: Rachael

reviews.text: Excellent speakers perfect when hiking, kayaking, or anywhere outside like eating al fresco on the patio of your apartment.
reviews.author: Patricia

reviews.title: Alec Lansing Jolt Speaker
reviews.text: My brother in law just loves this Alex Lansing mini Bluetooth speaker.
reviews.author: Smitty

reviews.title: Excellent Mini Speaker
reviews.text:
Literally the best waterproof speaker I've ever bought. I use this primarily when I'm taking a shower to listen to music/podcasts and its amazing. Sound quality and bass is relatively respectable for a waterproof mini speaker. In all honesty though, the bass is so strong that I haven't actually listened to it on a very loud level because the speaker moves off my shower ledge so I guess that shows the power it can push. No connection issues, in-call speaker works fine. Superiorly waterproof and impact proof (from the falls off the shower ledges (about 6.5ft) and never has an issue). 
   The thing I love most about this speaker though is it's battery life and reliability. I've had this speaker since 8/2019 (a year and some change) and I've honestly charged it about 4 times. I do only use it for short bursts of 10 mins and seldom 40 min sessions but the sitting battery life is IMPECCABLE. 
  I would 10000000% recommend and honestly if it could fit I would splurge on a larger speaker. These are usually on sale too so if you ever see it discounted and you're looking for a waterproof speaker, THIS is the brand. Probably my favorite Best Buy purchase.
reviews.author: Justin

reviews.title: BTspeaker

reviews.title: Great price and great quality!
reviews.text: My wife absolutely loves this! She uses this every day, and the battery life is unmatched! Also love the 1/4-20 thread on the bottom, so I can put this on a light stand or tripod if I need it off the ground or counter (backyard party, etc.). The quality of the sound is amazing as well- plenty of lows and mids to give it a full sound, not like a lot of "tin-like" highs on other bluetooth speakers.

reviews.title: Blu Ray Speaker
reviews.text: The first one I bought didn't last a week. Once it ran out of charge, it would not recharge with the provided cable. The second one I got, which was the replacement to the first one did the exact same thing. Would not turn back on even when having the cord plugged into the device and into a power source. The power light would illuminate like it was charging, but leaving it plugged in for days, it still would not turn on and go completely dark once unplugged from the cord. It's a cool color, though, and when it DID work for the short time I had it the sound was okay.
